evals.prompt: Is Peerlist worth submitting to for SEO backlinks? How does the backlink compare to other directories?
evals.expected_output: Explains Peerlist has DR76 but backlinks are nofollow, so no SEO link equity is passed. Compares with dofollow alternatives like Uneed (DR74), Fazier (DR81), DevHunt (DR57-62). Recommends Peerlist for community and visibility but not as an SEO backlink strategy.

assertions.name: nofollow_explained
assertions.description: States that Peerlist backlinks are nofollow and explains this means reduced or no SEO link equity compared to dofollow links

assertions.name: comparison
assertions.description: Compares Peerlist's backlink value with at least one dofollow directory like Uneed, Fazier, or DevHunt

assertions.name: community_value
assertions.description: Notes that Peerlist's primary value is community engagement, feedback, or professional credibility rather than SEO backlinks

evals.prompt: How do I launch my project on Peerlist Launchpad and what should I prepare?
evals.expected_output: Walks through the launch process: complete profile to 70%+, build a streak for vote multipliers, prepare assets (name, tagline, logo, screenshots, description, categories, tech tags), submit for Monday launch, engage during the week.

assertions.name: launch_process
assertions.description: Describes submitting to Launchpad with a Monday launch schedule and the need to prepare assets like name, tagline, and screenshots

assertions.name: streak_advantage
assertions.description: Mentions the streak-based voting system where sustained daily activity increases vote value or multiplier

assertions.name: profile_requirement
assertions.description: Notes that a certain level of profile completion is needed before launching on Launchpad

evals.prompt: Should I launch on Peerlist or Product Hunt first?
evals.expected_output: Compares the two: Peerlist has weekly launches with all projects featured and lower stakes, Product Hunt has daily 24-hour windows with higher competition. Recommends Peerlist first to refine listing and get feedback, then Product Hunt with polished assets.

assertions.name: platform_comparison
assertions.description: Compares key differences between Peerlist and Product Hunt such as launch frequency, competition level, or audience

assertions.name: sequencing_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends an order for launching — either Peerlist first for practice or Product Hunt first for maximum impact, with reasoning

assertions.name: unique_peerlist_features
assertions.description: Mentions at least one Peerlist-specific feature like all projects being featured, weekly launches, or streak-based voting
